synopsis: 威尼斯影展最佳導演、最佳新人演員、影評人費比西大獎 青龍獎最佳新人獎 美國獨立精神獎最佳外語片入圍 韓國名導李滄東跨世紀經典之作，全新4K數位修復版首度上映 在洪宗道出獄後，家人對他十分排斥，而他之所以被判入獄，只是為了頂替哥哥過失殺人的罪名。心冷意涼的他，來到死者的住所拜訪家屬，遇到死者的女兒韓恭洙，卻發現她是一名重度腦性麻痹患者，雖然她面容扭曲、手腳抽搐，但宗道卻被她吸引，並在衝動下做出大膽舉動…….。但在意外事件後，兩人卻彼此都萌生了愛情，兩顆孤獨心靈就此漸漸靠攏。他們看似身心不甚健全的非正常人，但卻擁有顆純潔之心，但卻一連串發生遭遇現實不公不義事件。最後，命運是否就此放過戲弄他們的機會呢？ An irresponsible and childish ex-con befriends a girl with cerebral palsy and develops a progressively stronger bond with her.
synopsis_en:
Winner of Best Director, the Marcello Mastroianni Award, and the FIPRESCI Prize at the Venice Film Festival, as well as a Blue Dragon Award for Best New Actress and an Independent Spirit Award nomination for Best Foreign Film. This cross-century classic by acclaimed Korean director Lee Chang-dong returns to the screen in a stunning new 4K digital restoration.

Upon his release from prison, Hong Jong-du finds himself shunned by his family—the very people he protected by taking the fall for his brother’s crime of involuntary manslaughter. Dejected and alone, he visits the home of the victim’s family, where he meets the daughter, Han Gong-ju, who suffers from severe cerebral palsy. Despite her physical contortions, Jong-du finds himself drawn to her, leading to an impulsive and bold encounter. In the aftermath of this incident, an unexpected love blossoms between them as two lonely souls find solace in one another. Though society views them as "abnormal" or "broken," they possess a purity of heart that is constantly tested by a series of social injustices. Will fate finally stop toying with their lives? An irresponsible and childish ex-con befriends a girl with cerebral palsy and develops a progressively stronger bond with her.

tmdb_overview: Miranda Priestly navigates her career amid the decline of traditional magazine publishing. She faces off against Emily Charlton, her one-time assistant, now a high-powered executive for a luxury group, with advertising dollars that Priestly desperately needs.
tmdb_overview_en: Miranda Priestly navigates her career amid the decline of traditional magazine publishing. She faces off against Emily Charlton, her one-time assistant, now a high-powered executive for a luxury group, with advertising dollars that Priestly desperately needs.

tmdb_overview: 她是女神、是聖母、是電、是光、是舞臺上的神話。流行天后儘管擁有無數歌迷擁戴，舞台下卻被困囚在幻聽與失眠的陰影中。為了籌備全新演出而瀕臨崩潰的她，登門尋求疏遠已久的好友兼傳奇服裝設計師協助，試圖在高級訂製服的層層織網中，重新縫補自己破碎的靈魂。當兩人隱身於穀倉的工作室，過去的愛恨情仇、權力拉鋸與扭曲慾望，如同鬼魅，隨著針線與旋律穿透皮膚，化作名望與自我摧毀的心理戰爭。
tmdb_overview_en: Long-buried wounds rise to the surface when iconic pop star Mother Mary reunites with her estranged best friend and former costume designer Sam Anselm on the eve of her comeback performance.

tmdb_overview: 在巴黎時裝週的喧囂狂熱中，三位女性的人生於花都交織出命運的篇章。美國導演麥克絲在得知罹患乳癌後，與長期合作的夥伴產生了預料之外的情感聯繫。名模新秀艾達遠從南蘇丹而來，只為逃離家鄉早已被命定的未來。化妝師安潔則始終隱身於華麗伸展台的陰影下，默默支撐著光鮮的世界。隨著她們的人生軌跡產生交錯，電影捕捉了在公眾演出的光環背後，那份靜謐卻堅不可摧的韌性，更溫柔致敬這群跨越職業、文化與國界的女性，在無聲之中守望相助的真摯情誼。
tmdb_overview_en: In the frenzy of Fashion Week, three women cross paths in Paris, grappling with the world's tragedies and the questions of their lives: Maxine, an American film director in her forties, discovers she has cancer; Ada, a young South Sudanese model, escapes a predetermined destiny to be thrust into a deceptive universe and French makeup artist Angèle, a small hand working in the shadows of the catwalks, dreams of escaping her life.

synopsis: 超人，是超越自我的人。第一集紀錄片《台灣超人》記錄了許多克服先天限制的超人，而在《超人再起》中，鏡頭轉向那些面對後天重創的勇者：有眼盲卻打破跳遠紀錄的國手；有在高雄氣爆中遭受重度灼傷仍重返救援崗位的消防員；也有因車禍截肢卻挑戰陸海空三棲運動的獨腳鐵人，難以想像那些需要多大的勇氣才能走過，但他們不僅做到了，更在重生之後伸出援手，陪伴與自己有著相似經歷的人前行。透過他們的故事，我們看見傷痕如何轉化為力量，也看見了家人們對他們的支持與陪伴，更看見超人們一道道穿越黑暗、再次迎向光的生命軌跡，這是想分享給大家，也希望能延續台灣超人帶給大家的一股力量……。
tmdb_overview: 《超人再起》是《台灣超人》系列的最終篇章。當你看見消防員 余泰運 在高雄氣爆重傷後，忍痛復健，重新穿上那件沉重的消防衣；當你看見楊川輝 在一夕之間失去視力與聽力，卻不放棄在黑暗中一次次起跑，直到衝過亞洲紀錄。還有好多好多超人的故事，都在這部電影之中。你或許會想起生命裡那些「不知道還能不能撐下去」的漫長黑夜，也慢慢開始相信，只要願意不斷往前，路自然會出現。
synopsis_en:
A "Superman" is someone who transcends themselves. While the first documentary, *Taiwan Superman*, chronicled those who overcame congenital limitations, *Superman Rising* turns its lens toward heroes facing severe acquired trauma. 

The film features a blind national athlete who shattered long jump records; a firefighter who suffered severe burns in the Kaohsiung gas explosions yet returned to his post; and a one-legged "Ironman" who, after losing a limb in a car accident, now challenges himself in land, sea, and air sports. It is difficult to imagine the immense courage required to navigate such hardships, yet these individuals did more than just endure—following their "rebirth," they reached out to support others walking similar paths. 

Through their stories, we see how scars are transformed into strength and witness the unwavering devotion of their families. We follow the life trajectories of these "Supermen" as they break through the darkness to face the light once more. This film is shared with the hope of continuing the empowering spirit that the *Taiwan Superman* series brings to us all.

synopsis: 威尼斯影展最佳導演、最佳新人演員、影評人費比西大獎 青龍獎最佳新人獎 美國獨立精神獎最佳外語片入圍 韓國名導李滄東跨世紀經典之作，全新4K數位修復版首度上映 在洪宗道出獄後，家人對他十分排斥，而他之所以被判入獄，只是為了頂替哥哥過失殺人的罪名。心冷意涼的他，來到死者的住所拜訪家屬，遇到死者的女兒韓恭洙，卻發現她是一名重度腦性麻痹患者，雖然她面容扭曲、手腳抽搐，但宗道卻被她吸引，並在衝動下做出大膽舉動…….。但在意外事件後，兩人卻彼此都萌生了愛情，兩顆孤獨心靈就此漸漸靠攏。他們看似身心不甚健全的非正常人，但卻擁有顆純潔之心，但卻一連串發生遭遇現實不公不義事件。最後，命運是否就此放過戲弄他們的機會呢？ An irresponsible and childish ex-con befriends a girl with cerebral palsy and develops a progressively stronger bond with her.
synopsis_en:
Winner of Best Director, the Marcello Mastroianni Award, and the FIPRESCI Prize at the Venice Film Festival, as well as a Blue Dragon Award for Best New Actress and an Independent Spirit Award nomination for Best Foreign Film. This cross-century classic by acclaimed Korean director Lee Chang-dong returns to the screen in a stunning new 4K digital restoration.

Upon his release from prison, Hong Jong-du finds himself shunned by his family—the very people he protected by taking the fall for his brother’s crime of involuntary manslaughter. Dejected and alone, he visits the home of the victim’s family, where he meets the daughter, Han Gong-ju, who suffers from severe cerebral palsy. Despite her physical contortions, Jong-du finds himself drawn to her, leading to an impulsive and bold encounter. In the aftermath of this incident, an unexpected love blossoms between them as two lonely souls find solace in one another. Though society views them as "abnormal" or "broken," they possess a purity of heart that is constantly tested by a series of social injustices. Will fate finally stop toying with their lives? An irresponsible and childish ex-con befriends a girl with cerebral palsy and develops a progressively stronger bond with her.

director: 查揚諾布普拉寇（冥婚鬧泰大） 納塔吾彭皮里亞（模犯生） 阿塔海姆瓦迪（他的最後一個朋友）
synopsis: ★ 《金孫爆富攻略》《模犯生》億萬製片感動新作 ★ 2026年治癒催淚大作，準備好面紙體會浪浪一生 ★
synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.
★ A rare exploration of the guide dog theme, using a delicate narrative to sincerely portray the profound bond between humans and dogs.
★ A nuanced portrayal of the challenges faced by the visually impaired, witnessing the emotional journey from initial resistance to ultimate trust.

Five adorable Labrador puppies are born into a Tokyo household. One stands out from the rest, marked by a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on its belly. Since the puppies' father was a guide dog, their owner harbors a long-held hope that one of them will follow in his footsteps and become an exceptional guide dog. Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected. Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. The puppy with the birthmark is the one chosen, marking the very first separation of its life.

Movie Trailer

director: 伊爾蒂蔻恩伊達 Ildikó Enyedi
synopsis: ★榮獲威尼斯影展國際影評人費比西獎、馬斯楚安尼獎等六項大獎 德國一座中世紀大學城的植物園中，一棵古老的銀杏樹靜靜矗立著，見證著三個時代中人們與自然之間的深層聯結。故事始於1908年，女學生格蕾特帶著科學熱忱，透過植物攝影發現銀杏樹隱藏在微觀自然中的神聖規律…。1972年，性格孤僻的學生漢內斯，為了愛情去照料一盆天竺葵，開始察覺植物也有其獨特的感知能力…。2020年，因疫情神經科學家王教授被困在空無一人的校園，與古老的銀杏樹產生了靈魂的共鳴，開始一場結合生命科學與植物感知的實驗，發現百年前格蕾特的女性影像與漢內斯對生命的感知，都如同年輪般、封存在這棵樹的記憶裡……。
tmdb_overview: 德國某大學，一棵矗立在此好幾世紀的銀杏樹，靜靜地陪伴世間風景變換。1908年，第一個招收的女學生，在男性主宰的世界裡以攝影發掘了植物的奧祕。1972年．沉默的男孩與一株天竺葵之間，牽起了難以言說的連結。2020年，前來講學的香港神經學家為疫情所困，對銀杏樹展開奇想實驗。三組人物、三個篇章，跨越了時間與空間，在樹下織起了神祕且美麗的交會。
tmdb_overview_en: On the grounds of a medieval German university town looms an imposing Ginkgo biloba, a tree whose longevity stands in marked contrast to three intimate, human-scaled stories. In 1908, the university’s first female student gains admission into the prestigious botany department, confronting the sexism of both professors and peers. In 1972, amidst counterculture movements, a reserved student finds his attention captured by a fellow housemate and the geranium plant she studies. In 2020, during the COVID-19 pandemic, a neuroscientist from Hong Kong secures the help of a renowned botanist for an experiment on the old ginkgo tree.

tmdb_overview: Cate is a smart, working class girl under the thumb of her best friend Maddie, but Cate is having trouble conforming to what Maddie and high school society demand of her. Both girls are preoccupied with the same boy, but only one of them is being sent poetry.
tmdb_overview_en: Cate is a smart, working class girl under the thumb of her best friend Maddie, but Cate is having trouble conforming to what Maddie and high school society demand of her. Both girls are preoccupied with the same boy, but only one of them is being sent poetry.

tmdb_original_title: โกฮัง..หัวใจโกโฮม
tmdb_overview: 在長達十年的時光中，一隻名叫「悟飯」的白色流浪狗，有著粉嫩嫩的鼻子，在生命旅途中不斷漂泊，承載著一段段無法被遺忘的記憶。牠陪過一位快退休的日本工程師，度過平靜又溫暖的日子；也跟著一位在收容所工作的年輕緬甸女傭，經歷心跳加速的生活；最後，牠走進一位藝術系學生的人生，慢慢教會對方什麼是「愛」。這是一個關於時光流逝、相遇與離別，還有一隻把一切都記在心裡的狗狗故事。
tmdb_overview_en: The bonds between humans and animals following a stray dog named Gohan as it moves through life with temporary owners over a decade, through good times and bad times, joy and sorrow, hellos and goodbyes.

movie_title_en: Palimpsest: The Story Of A Name
synopsis: ★2025金馬獎最佳紀錄片、剪輯 資深剪輯師雪美蓮，總納悶自己到底姓史蒂芬，還是姓雪、姓陳？明明亞洲臉，又非混血，怎取洋人姓？一查不得了，父親竟來自澳洲！母親曾有文學夢，似還牽涉吳爾芙姪子的中國戀情？她化身偵探親自執導，翻找父親傳記、家庭電影、老照片，以「史蒂芬」為圓心，拼出一幅與世紀風雲、名人交織的私密家族史，追問殖民與身分認同。血緣纏如網，個體仍能重寫自我，乘故事翱翔。
tmdb_title: Palimpsest: the Story of a Name
tmdb_title_en: Palimpsest: the Story of a Name
tmdb_overview: 資深剪輯師雪美蓮，總納悶自己到底姓史蒂芬，還是姓雪、姓陳？明明亞洲臉，又非混血，怎取洋人姓？一查不得了，父親竟來自澳洲！母親曾有文學夢，似還牽涉吳爾芙姪子的中國戀情？她化身偵探親自執導，翻找父親傳記、家庭電影、老照片，以「史蒂芬」為圓心，拼出一幅與世紀風雲、名人交織的私密家族史，追問殖民與身分認同。血緣纏如網，個體仍能重寫自我，乘故事翱翔。
tmdb_overview_en: Veteran filmmaker Mary Stephen digs into her own family past to uncover the long-hidden origins of her Western surname, revealing a story of culture shock, colonialism, and contested remembrance.

synopsis: 雲林北港，一場警匪追捕意外牽動三世未解的因果輪迴。冷血殺手黑豬在逃亡途中犯下重案，無神信仰的警察符皓一路追緝，卻在過程中遇到神秘道士莫月鼎，進入閾限空間。善良護士黃琪琪因救人捲入風暴，也逐漸揭開自己與兩人之間深藏的宿命連結。隨著媽祖聖誕將近，北港街頭、廟埕與信仰儀式交織成一場人神共感的生命現場。當前世仇怨與今生抉擇同時逼近，每個人都必須面對內心的怨與執念。《農曆三月二十三》融合奇幻、信仰與人性情感，描寫一段從冤仇走向理解、從執著走向救贖的靈性旅程。 電影預告 其他熱映 now showing view more

synopsis: 超人，是超越自我的人。 導演曲全立在35歲那年被宣告腦瘤復發、僅剩半年生命，在經歷重大手術後奇蹟生還，卻也在後腦留下長長疤痕，並承受半聾半失明的後遺症。這場與生命正面交鋒的經歷，徹底改變了他對影像創作的提問——「我的影像作品，能為台灣帶來什麼力量？」於是他回到初心，不再只是為了被看見，而是希望真正走進人心。 第一集紀錄片《台灣超人》記錄了許多克服先天限制的超人，而在《超人再起》中，鏡頭轉向那些面對後天重創的勇者：有眼盲卻打破跳遠紀錄的國手；有在高雄氣爆中遭受重度灼傷仍重返救援崗位的消防員；也有因車禍截肢卻挑戰陸海空三棲運動的獨腳鐵人，難以想像那些需要多大的勇氣才能走過，但他們不僅做到了，更在重生之後伸出援手，陪伴與自己有著相似經歷的人前行。透過他們的故事，我們看見傷痕如何轉化為力量，也看見了家人們對他們的支持與陪伴，更看見超人們一道道穿越黑暗、再次迎向光的生命軌跡，這是想分享給大家，也希望能延續台灣超人帶給大家的一股力量。 電影預告 其他熱映

synopsis: 66歲的美子與16歲的孫子相依為命。然而隨著年齡增長，她逐漸察覺記憶開始出現問題，被診斷出早期阿茲海默症。就在此時，一起震驚社區的少女死亡事件，也讓原本平靜的生活蒙上一層陰影。某天，美子在社區文化中心看到一張「詩歌課程」的海報，抱著好奇與期待報名參加。老師鼓勵學生重新觀察世界，從花朵、風景與日常細節中發現詩意。於是，美子開始用不同的眼光凝視身邊的一切。然而，在尋找詩句的過程中，美子也逐漸被迫面對現實與人性的複雜。當記憶逐漸流逝，她試圖在破碎的生活中寫下屬於自己的詩，也重新思考：在這個並不完美的世界裡，人究竟該如何守住善良與尊嚴呢?
tmdb_overview: Crude Poetry is a film about language. It is a film about a deep wish to be understood. Set in the ruins of biblical Babel, a long-lost city which housed speakers of a so called ‘universal language’, two characters come together to make meaning, in this stop motion, live puppetry hybrid.
tmdb_overview_en: Crude Poetry is a film about language. It is a film about a deep wish to be understood. Set in the ruins of biblical Babel, a long-lost city which housed speakers of a so called ‘universal language’, two characters come together to make meaning, in this stop motion, live puppetry hybrid.

tmdb_overview: 故事描述超人的頭號宿敵雷克斯計劃消滅超人的超能力，而超人也終於認清一個令他傷心欲絕的事實，那就是他最愛的女人露薏絲已經不再愛他，決定永遠消失在他的生命中，或者仍有挽回的機會？  超人重返地球後，除了想要再度拉近他和露薏絲之間的距離之外，也要試著活在一個早已學會不需要他的世界生活。但是在地球發生危機時，超人必須保護這個他熱愛的世界不被壞人摧毀，於是他踏上一場前所未見的冒險歷程，從最深的海底一直到最遙遠的外太空，試圖尋找自己存在的意義。
tmdb_overview_en: Superman returns to discover his 5-year absence has allowed Lex Luthor to walk free, and that those he was closest to felt abandoned and have moved on. Luthor plots his ultimate revenge that could see millions killed and change the face of the planet forever, as well as ridding himself of the Man of Steel.

tmdb_overview: Two female agents from a rival gang are sent to disrupt the operations of a gold-smuggler's caravan in Africa.
tmdb_overview_en: Two female agents from a rival gang are sent to disrupt the operations of a gold-smuggler's caravan in Africa.

synopsis: 韓國名導李滄東經典之作，全新4K數位修復版首度台灣公開上映 洪宗道出獄後，家人對他十分排斥，而他之所以被判入獄，只是為了頂替哥哥過失殺人的罪名。心冷意涼的他，來到死者的住所拜訪家屬，遇到死者的女兒韓恭洙，卻發現她是一名重度腦性麻痹患者，雖然她面容扭曲、手腳抽搐，但宗道卻被她吸引，並在衝動下做出大膽舉動……。但在意外事件後，兩人卻彼此都萌生了愛情，兩顆孤獨心靈就此漸漸靠攏。他們看似身心不甚健全的非正常人，但卻擁有顆純潔之心，但卻一連串發生遭遇現實不公不義事件。最後，命運是否就此放過戲弄他們的機會呢？
synopsis_en:
A classic masterpiece by renowned Korean director Lee Chang-dong, now premiering in Taiwan for the first time in a brand-new 4K digital restoration. 

Upon his release from prison, Hong Jong-du finds himself rejected by his family; he had only served time to take the blame for his brother’s involuntary manslaughter charge. Dejected and lost, he visits the home of the victim’s family, where he meets the daughter, Han Gong-ju. He discovers she suffers from severe cerebral palsy, and though her face is contorted and her limbs twitch, Jong-du finds himself drawn to her, leading him to commit a bold and impulsive act. 

Yet, following this unexpected encounter, a genuine love blossoms between them as two lonely souls draw closer together. Though society views them as "abnormal" due to their physical and mental conditions, they possess pure hearts that are soon subjected to a series of cruel injustices. In the end, will fate finally stop toying with their lives?

synopsis: 《穿著Prada的惡魔》續集，再度由原班主創團隊攜手打造，導演大衛法蘭克與編劇艾琳布洛許麥肯納回歸掌舵，梅莉史翠普、安海瑟薇、艾蜜莉布朗特與史丹利圖奇將重返時尚之都紐約，與《Runway》雜誌那冷冽俐落的辦公室，再度掀起一場高端時尚的旋風。 電影預告 其他熱映 now showing view more
synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.
★ A rare exploration of the guide dog theme, using a delicate narrative to sincerely portray the profound bond between humans and dogs.
★ A nuanced portrayal of the challenges faced by the visually impaired, witnessing the emotional journey from initial resistance to ultimate trust.

Five adorable Labrador puppies are born into a Tokyo household. One stands out from the rest, marked by a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on its belly. Since the puppies' father was a guide dog, their owner harbors a long-held hope that one of them will follow in his footsteps and become an exceptional guide dog. Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected. Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. The puppy with the birthmark is the one chosen, marking the very first separation of its life.

movie_title: 六張臉：狂言師的舞台人生
movie_title_en: Six Faces: Kyogen, A Life on Stage
synopsis: 狂言之路九十載 人間國寶野村万作窮盡一生所達到的演藝境界 日本奧斯卡名導犬童一心執導，影帝小田切讓溫柔旁白獻聲 演藝如明月，高深不可及 狂言，是日本傳承逾650年、以笑聲描繪人性喜怒哀樂的傳統藝術。 狂言界的第一把交椅——人間國寶野村万作，自三歲初次登台以來，九十年來始終致力於這門技藝，並於2023年獲頒文化勳章。本片貼身記錄了野村萬作大師在迎向94歲高壽之際，舉行紀念公演的特別日子。公演劇目選定為其近年持續鑽研、深刻描繪夫妻之愛的經典狂言**〈川上〉**。 故事敘述一名失明男子前往「川上地藏」參拜，雖然如願重獲光明，卻在夢中接到地藏要求他「與妻離異」的殘酷試煉。 在視力與摯愛之間，男子面臨人生最艱難的抉擇。 電影透過精湛的鏡頭語言，不僅完整收錄了這段至高演藝，更將大師在後台那挺拔、追求極致美感的職人身影一併銘刻。
synopsis_en:
Ninety Years on the Path of Kyogen: The Artistic Pinnacle of Living National Treasure Nomura Mansaku

Directed by Japan Academy Prize-winning director Isshin Inudo, with gentle narration by award-winning actor Joe Odagiri.

Artistry like the bright moon—profound and beyond reach.

Kyogen is a traditional Japanese performing art with a legacy spanning over 650 years, using laughter to depict the full spectrum of human emotion. A leading figure in the world of Kyogen, Living National Treasure Nomura Mansaku has dedicated himself to the craft for ninety years since his stage debut at the age of three. In 2023, he was honored with the Order of Culture. This documentary provides an intimate look at Master Nomura Mansaku as he approaches his 94th year, capturing the special occasion of his commemorative performance.

The chosen program is the classic Kyogen play *Kawakami*, a piece he has refined in recent years that poignantly explores the love between a husband and wife. The story follows a blind man who makes a pilgrimage to "Kawakami Jizo." Though his sight is miraculously restored, he is faced with a cruel trial in a dream: the deity demands that he divorce his wife. Caught between the gift of sight and the love of his life, the man faces his most agonizing decision.

Through masterful cinematography, the film not only preserves this pinnacle of performance but also captures the master’s disciplined presence backstage—the silhouette of a true craftsman in pursuit of ultimate beauty.

synopsis: ★ 榮獲坎城影展一種注目最佳劇本獎、勇奪美國哥譚獎最佳改編劇本獎 科林是個溫暖熱忱、隨遇而安的壁花男孩。儘管母親認為他應該約會，科林卻顯得興致缺缺，從不主動追求自己渴望的事物。直到有天，他遇見重機俱樂部的領袖雷，這位高大又帥到讓人無法直視的男人，將科林收為自己的「順從者」。雷把科林從沉悶的郊區生活中一把抽離，帶進一個充滿酷兒色彩、帶點特殊性趣的重機社群，也讓他體驗了人生中無數個「第一次」。然而，當科林越陷越深、走入雷那個充斥規則與謎團的世界後，他才開始懷疑，這種全年無休、二十四小時都得「服從」的生活，真的是自己想要的嗎？坐上雷的後座，科林究竟是找到了命中注定的歸屬，還是陷入了另一種令人窒息的枷鎖？

director: 伊爾蒂蔻恩伊達 Ildiko Enyedi
synopsis: France/China | Color | Germany | 147min | C/E Subtitles | 輔12 威尼斯影展國際影評人費比西獎、馬斯楚安尼獎等六項大獎 芝加哥國際影展 銀雨果獎最佳攝影獎 Silver Spike國際影展銀穗獎與綠穗獎 里斯本影展 評審團特別獎 永河畔拉羅什國際影展 評審團大獎 奧斯滕德影展 最佳影片大獎 坎城影帝 梁朝偉 ╳ 法國影后 蕾雅瑟杜（Léa Seydoux） 一棵銀杏樹，三個世代的百年風華 德國一座中世紀大學城的植物園中，一棵古老的銀杏樹靜靜矗立著。這個沉默的見證者，見證著三個時代中、人們與自然之間的深層聯結。 故事始於1908年。才華橫溢的女學生格蕾特（露娜維德勒 飾）帶著科學熱忱，在那個科學界由男性主導的年代，她試圖衝破性別枷鎖，透過植物攝影發現銀杏樹隱藏在微觀自然中的神聖規律。這棵銀杏樹也見證了女性與科學的覺醒。 時光流轉來到1972年，銀杏樹更加壯碩。性格孤僻的學生漢內斯（恩佐布魯姆 飾），為了愛情去照料一盆天竺葵，開始察覺植物也有其獨特的感知能力。這份對植物的感知與連結，除撫慰了他的孤獨，更改變了他對世界與自我關係的看法。 時序進入2020年，全球因疫情變得寂靜。神經科學家王教授（梁朝偉 飾）被困在空無一人的馬爾堡大學校園，與古老的銀杏樹產生了靈魂的共鳴。他在植物學家愛麗絲（蕾雅瑟杜 飾）啟發下，開始一場結合生命科學與植物感知的實驗，發現百年前格蕾特的女性影像與漢內斯對生命的感知，都如同年輪般、封存在這棵樹的記憶裡。 三個不同時代的孤獨靈魂，在銀杏樹的葉落與光影中，完成一場跨時空交匯。他們在大自然的見證下，被大自然靜謐、永恆且神祕的力量所改變，進而省思了生命的意涵。 Set in the botanical garden of a medieval town in Germany. Three epochs, three personalities, three sometimes clumsy but sincere attempts to free themselves and to create links with the plants and the world of the garden. An encounter.
tmdb_overview: 德國某大學，一棵矗立在此好幾世紀的銀杏樹，靜靜地陪伴世間風景變換。1908年，第一個招收的女學生，在男性主宰的世界裡以攝影發掘了植物的奧祕。1972年．沉默的男孩與一株天竺葵之間，牽起了難以言說的連結。2020年，前來講學的香港神經學家為疫情所困，對銀杏樹展開奇想實驗。三組人物、三個篇章，跨越了時間與空間，在樹下織起了神祕且美麗的交會。
tmdb_overview_en: On the grounds of a medieval German university town looms an imposing Ginkgo biloba, a tree whose longevity stands in marked contrast to three intimate, human-scaled stories. In 1908, the university’s first female student gains admission into the prestigious botany department, confronting the sexism of both professors and peers. In 1972, amidst counterculture movements, a reserved student finds his attention captured by a fellow housemate and the geranium plant she studies. In 2020, during the COVID-19 pandemic, a neuroscientist from Hong Kong secures the help of a renowned botanist for an experiment on the old ginkgo tree.

movie_title: 讓建築歌唱～徐亞英的交響人生
movie_title_en: Tuning Architecture:The Life of Albert Xu in Sound
synopsis: 華裔建築聲學大師徐亞英長年與貝聿銘、法蘭克蓋瑞等多位普立茲克獎得主的建築大師合作，以隱形的聲學設計著稱，在世界各地設計和建造了近百座文化演出和藝術展覽性建築，而他晚年的集大成之作就在台灣的衛武營國家藝術文化中心，更是他最滿意之作。建築聲學是物理、音樂、建築及科學的總合，聲學家賦予音樂穿梭於經過設計的空間，讓美好的樂音能感動人心。我們跟隨著徐老師清瘦而穩健的步伐，重回他最具代表性的作品，如羅浮宮金字塔、盧森堡愛樂音樂廳等，娓娓道來他如何為建築師解決問題，成為波宗巴克口中的「Why not」先生……。
tmdb_title: Tuning Architecture: The Life of Albert Xu in Sound
tmdb_title_en: Tuning Architecture: The Life of Albert Xu in Sound
tmdb_title_local: 讓建築歌唱～徐亞英的交響人生
tmdb_original_title: 讓建築歌唱～徐亞英的交響人生
tmdb_overview: 華裔建築聲學大師徐亞英長年與貝聿銘、法蘭克蓋瑞等多位普立茲克獎得主的建築大師合作，以隱形的聲學設計著稱，在世界各地設計和建造了近百座文化演出和藝術展覽性建築，而他晚年的集大成之作就在台灣的衛武營國家藝術文化中心，更是他最滿意之作。建築聲學是物理、音樂、建築及科學的總合，聲學家賦予音樂穿梭於經過設計的空間，讓美好的樂音能感動人心。我們跟隨著徐老師清瘦而穩健的步伐，重回他最具代表性的作品，如羅浮宮金字塔、盧森堡愛樂音樂廳等，娓娓道來他如何為建築師解決問題，成爲波宗巴克口中的『Why not』先生。他對聲學的熱情也驅使他不辭勞苦地奔波於每個設計案工地，投入一甲子的光陰追求聲音美學與空間和諧。
synopsis_en:
Renowned Chinese-American architectural acoustics master Xu Yaying spent decades collaborating with Pritzker Prize-winning legends such as I.M. Pei and Frank Gehry. Celebrated for his "invisible" acoustic designs, Xu contributed to the design and construction of nearly a hundred cultural and artistic venues worldwide. His late-career magnum opus—and the project he takes the most pride in—is Taiwan’s National Kaohsiung Center for the Arts (Weiwuying).

Architectural acoustics is a synthesis of physics, music, architecture, and science. An acoustician enables music to flow through a meticulously designed space, ensuring that beautiful melodies can truly move the human heart. Following Xu’s lean yet steady footsteps, we revisit his most iconic masterpieces, including the Louvre Pyramid and the Philharmonie Luxembourg. He recounts his journey of solving complex challenges for architects, revealing how he earned the nickname "Mr. Why Not" from Christian de Portzamparc.

tmdb_overview: 查理在咖啡廳邂逅艾瑪，一場笨拙的搭話開啟了兩年的甜蜜愛戀。正當兩人深信彼此是唯一、著手籌備婚禮時，一場好友聚會卻掀起波瀾。在「分享最糟糕往事」的遊戲中，艾瑪意外坦白一段不為人知的震撼過去。這份祕密讓全場難以置信，也讓查理開始重新審視這份關係。在步入禮堂的最後關頭，兩人的愛情正受誠信與信任的嚴峻考驗。
tmdb_overview_en: A happily engaged couple is put to the test when an unexpected turn sends their wedding week off the rails.

tmdb_overview: 在巴黎時裝週的喧囂狂熱中，三位女性的人生於花都交織出命運的篇章。美國導演麥克絲在得知罹患乳癌後，與長期合作的夥伴產生了預料之外的情感聯繫。名模新秀艾達遠從南蘇丹而來，只為逃離家鄉早已被命定的未來。化妝師安潔則始終隱身於華麗伸展台的陰影下，默默支撐著光鮮的世界。隨著她們的人生軌跡產生交錯，電影捕捉了在公眾演出的光環背後，那份靜謐卻堅不可摧的韌性，更溫柔致敬這群跨越職業、文化與國界的女性，在無聲之中守望相助的真摯情誼。
tmdb_overview_en: In the frenzy of Fashion Week, three women cross paths in Paris, grappling with the world's tragedies and the questions of their lives: Maxine, an American film director in her forties, discovers she has cancer; Ada, a young South Sudanese model, escapes a predetermined destiny to be thrust into a deceptive universe and French makeup artist Angèle, a small hand working in the shadows of the catwalks, dreams of escaping her life.

synopsis: 超人，是超越自我的人。第一集紀錄片《台灣超人》記錄了許多克服先天限制的超人，而在《超人再起》中，鏡頭轉向那些面對後天重創的勇者：有眼盲卻打破跳遠紀錄的國手；有在高雄氣爆中遭受重度灼傷仍重返救援崗位的消防員；也有因車禍截肢卻挑戰陸海空三棲運動的獨腳鐵人，難以想像那些需要多大的勇氣才能走過，但他們不僅做到了，更在重生之後伸出援手，陪伴與自己有著相似經歷的人前行。透過他們的故事，我們看見傷痕如何轉化為力量，也看見了家人們對他們的支持與陪伴，更看見超人們一道道穿越黑暗、再次迎向光的生命軌跡，這是想分享給大家，也希望能延續台灣超人帶給大家的一股力量……。
tmdb_overview: 《超人再起》是《台灣超人》系列的最終篇章。當你看見消防員 余泰運 在高雄氣爆重傷後，忍痛復健，重新穿上那件沉重的消防衣；當你看見楊川輝 在一夕之間失去視力與聽力，卻不放棄在黑暗中一次次起跑，直到衝過亞洲紀錄。還有好多好多超人的故事，都在這部電影之中。你或許會想起生命裡那些「不知道還能不能撐下去」的漫長黑夜，也慢慢開始相信，只要願意不斷往前，路自然會出現。
synopsis_en:
A "Superman" is someone who transcends themselves. While the first documentary, *Taiwan Superman*, chronicled those who overcame congenital limitations, *Superman Rising* turns its lens toward heroes facing severe acquired trauma. 

The film features a blind national athlete who shattered long jump records; a firefighter who suffered severe burns in the Kaohsiung gas explosions yet returned to his post; and a one-legged "Ironman" who, after losing a limb in a car accident, now challenges himself in land, sea, and air sports. It is difficult to imagine the immense courage required to navigate such hardships, yet these individuals did more than just endure—following their "rebirth," they reached out to support others walking similar paths. 

Through their stories, we see how scars are transformed into strength and witness the unwavering devotion of their families. We follow the life trajectories of these "Supermen" as they break through the darkness to face the light once more. This film is shared with the hope of continuing the empowering spirit that the *Taiwan Superman* series brings to us all.

synopsis: 拉卡與懷孕的妻子妮娜在飯店慶祝結婚紀念日，同時慶祝妻子終於實現當律師的夢想，原本幸福的夜晚卻突遭巨變，妮娜被名叫迪卡的男子殺害，拉卡以為在審判中真相終會大白，但很快發現整個審理受到嚴重操控，拉卡無法忍受，他在法庭上挾持眾人，逼迫重新審判，為了查明真相，捍衛屬於妮娜的正義，不惜付出一切代價。
source_language_note: 語言 印尼語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: For 25 years, Diddy's rise to stardom and power masked a darker reality. This documentary exposes the voices of those who were silenced-sharing allegations of abuse, manipulation, and career sabotage behind the scenes of his influential empire. It's a revealing look at the cost of fame and control in the music industry.
tmdb_overview_en: For 25 years, Diddy's rise to stardom and power masked a darker reality. This documentary exposes the voices of those who were silenced-sharing allegations of abuse, manipulation, and career sabotage behind the scenes of his influential empire. It's a revealing look at the cost of fame and control in the music industry.

synopsis: 改編自德國知名作家萊奧妮史汪的同名懸疑小說，凱爾巴爾達執導，《 死侍與金鋼狼 》 休傑克曼 、《
synopsis_en:
★ Based on the true story of a guide dog's life! Relive the heartwarming animal cinema classic that moved millions.
★ A rare exploration of the guide dog theme, using a delicate narrative to sincerely portray the profound bond between humans and dogs.
★ A nuanced portrayal of the challenges faced by the visually impaired, witnessing the emotional journey from initial resistance to ultimate trust.

Five adorable Labrador puppies are born into a Tokyo household. One stands out from the rest, marked by a unique cross-shaped black birthmark on its belly. Since the puppies' father was a guide dog, their owner harbors a long-held hope that one of them will follow in his footsteps and become an exceptional guide dog. Because the mother was not a guide dog, the owner’s requests are repeatedly rejected. Undeterred, her persistence finally pays off when a trainer from a guide dog school reluctantly agrees to take one of the puppies for a trial. The puppy with the birthmark is the one chosen, marking the very first separation of its life.

Movie Trailer

tmdb_overview: Miranda Priestly navigates her career amid the decline of traditional magazine publishing. She faces off against Emily Charlton, her one-time assistant, now a high-powered executive for a luxury group, with advertising dollars that Priestly desperately needs.
tmdb_overview_en: Miranda Priestly navigates her career amid the decline of traditional magazine publishing. She faces off against Emily Charlton, her one-time assistant, now a high-powered executive for a luxury group, with advertising dollars that Priestly desperately needs.

synopsis: 威尼斯影展最佳導演、最佳新人演員、影評人費比西大獎 青龍獎最佳新人獎 美國獨立精神獎最佳外語片入圍 韓國名導李滄東跨世紀經典之作，全新4K數位修復版首度上映 在洪宗道出獄後，家人對他十分排斥，而他之所以被判入獄，只是為了頂替哥哥過失殺人的罪名。心冷意涼的他，來到死者的住所拜訪家屬，遇到死者的女兒韓恭洙，卻發現她是一名重度腦性麻痹患者，雖然她面容扭曲、手腳抽搐，但宗道卻被她吸引，並在衝動下做出大膽舉動…….。但在意外事件後，兩人卻彼此都萌生了愛情，兩顆孤獨心靈就此漸漸靠攏。他們看似身心不甚健全的非正常人，但卻擁有顆純潔之心，但卻一連串發生遭遇現實不公不義事件。最後，命運是否就此放過戲弄他們的機會呢？ An irresponsible and childish ex-con befriends a girl with cerebral palsy and develops a progressively stronger bond with her.
synopsis_en:
Winner of Best Director, the Marcello Mastroianni Award, and the FIPRESCI Prize at the Venice Film Festival, as well as a Blue Dragon Award for Best New Actress and an Independent Spirit Award nomination for Best Foreign Film. This cross-century classic by acclaimed Korean director Lee Chang-dong returns to the screen in a stunning new 4K digital restoration.

Upon his release from prison, Hong Jong-du finds himself shunned by his family—the very people he protected by taking the fall for his brother’s crime of involuntary manslaughter. Dejected and alone, he visits the home of the victim’s family, where he meets the daughter, Han Gong-ju, who suffers from severe cerebral palsy. Despite her physical contortions, Jong-du finds himself drawn to her, leading to an impulsive and bold encounter. In the aftermath of this incident, an unexpected love blossoms between them as two lonely souls find solace in one another. Though society views them as "abnormal" or "broken," they possess a purity of heart that is constantly tested by a series of social injustices. Will fate finally stop toying with their lives? An irresponsible and childish ex-con befriends a girl with cerebral palsy and develops a progressively stronger bond with her.

tmdb_overview: 她是女神、是聖母、是電、是光、是舞臺上的神話。流行天后儘管擁有無數歌迷擁戴，舞台下卻被困囚在幻聽與失眠的陰影中。為了籌備全新演出而瀕臨崩潰的她，登門尋求疏遠已久的好友兼傳奇服裝設計師協助，試圖在高級訂製服的層層織網中，重新縫補自己破碎的靈魂。當兩人隱身於穀倉的工作室，過去的愛恨情仇、權力拉鋸與扭曲慾望，如同鬼魅，隨著針線與旋律穿透皮膚，化作名望與自我摧毀的心理戰爭。
tmdb_overview_en: Long-buried wounds rise to the surface when iconic pop star Mother Mary reunites with her estranged best friend and former costume designer Sam Anselm on the eve of her comeback performance.

synopsis: 韓國名導李滄東經典之作，全新4K數位修復版首度台灣公開上映 洪宗道出獄後，家人對他十分排斥，而他之所以被判入獄，只是為了頂替哥哥過失殺人的罪名。心冷意涼的他，來到死者的住所拜訪家屬，遇到死者的女兒韓恭洙，卻發現她是一名重度腦性麻痹患者，雖然她面容扭曲、手腳抽搐，但宗道卻被她吸引，並在衝動下做出大膽舉動……。但在意外事件後，兩人卻彼此都萌生了愛情，兩顆孤獨心靈就此漸漸靠攏。他們看似身心不甚健全的非正常人，但卻擁有顆純潔之心，但卻一連串發生遭遇現實不公不義事件。最後，命運是否就此放過戲弄他們的機會呢？
synopsis_en:
A classic masterpiece by renowned Korean director Lee Chang-dong, now premiering in Taiwan for the first time in a brand-new 4K digital restoration. 

Upon his release from prison, Hong Jong-du finds himself rejected by his family; he had only served time to take the blame for his brother’s involuntary manslaughter charge. Dejected and lost, he visits the home of the victim’s family, where he meets the daughter, Han Gong-ju. He discovers she suffers from severe cerebral palsy, and though her face is contorted and her limbs twitch, Jong-du finds himself drawn to her, leading him to commit a bold and impulsive act. 

Yet, following this unexpected encounter, a genuine love blossoms between them as two lonely souls draw closer together. Though society views them as "abnormal" due to their physical and mental conditions, they possess pure hearts that are soon subjected to a series of cruel injustices. In the end, will fate finally stop toying with their lives?

synopsis: 《穿著Prada的惡魔》續集，再度由原班主創團隊攜手打造，導演大衛法蘭克與編劇艾琳布洛許麥肯納回歸掌舵，梅莉史翠普、安海瑟薇、艾蜜莉布朗特與史丹利圖奇將重返時尚之都紐約，與《Runway》雜誌那冷冽俐落的辦公室，再度掀起一場高端時尚的旋風。 電影預告 其他熱映 now showing view more

synopsis: ★原作系列累積發行數突破千萬冊，異世界轉生題材霸權作全新劇場版！ ★「DOMOTO」堂本光一驚喜獻聲！睽違多年再戰動畫，首度挑戰劇場版原創關鍵角色 ★ TRUE 繼TV版再度獻唱劇場版主題曲《ユートピア》！ 【海淵國】是位於海底，奉水龍為守護神並加以崇拜的國家。那片土地，是過去與其他種族一同在地上生活的人們，為了追求和平之地而漂泊於世界，最終在追求安寧的盡頭，水龍賜給他們的、一個沒有紛爭的王國。然而，這樣的和平並未永遠持續下去— 。 長年為沉眠已久的水龍獻上祈禱的巫女尤菈，在得知有人意圖喚醒水龍，藉此攻打地上後，她帶著一族相傳的「笛子」，前往地上尋求救兵。

tmdb_overview: 德國某大學，一棵矗立在此好幾世紀的銀杏樹，靜靜地陪伴世間風景變換。1908年，第一個招收的女學生，在男性主宰的世界裡以攝影發掘了植物的奧祕。1972年．沉默的男孩與一株天竺葵之間，牽起了難以言說的連結。2020年，前來講學的香港神經學家為疫情所困，對銀杏樹展開奇想實驗。三組人物、三個篇章，跨越了時間與空間，在樹下織起了神祕且美麗的交會。
tmdb_overview_en: On the grounds of a medieval German university town looms an imposing Ginkgo biloba, a tree whose longevity stands in marked contrast to three intimate, human-scaled stories. In 1908, the university’s first female student gains admission into the prestigious botany department, confronting the sexism of both professors and peers. In 1972, amidst counterculture movements, a reserved student finds his attention captured by a fellow housemate and the geranium plant she studies. In 2020, during the COVID-19 pandemic, a neuroscientist from Hong Kong secures the help of a renowned botanist for an experiment on the old ginkgo tree.

tmdb_overview: Two female agents from a rival gang are sent to disrupt the operations of a gold-smuggler's caravan in Africa.
tmdb_overview_en: Two female agents from a rival gang are sent to disrupt the operations of a gold-smuggler's caravan in Africa.

tmdb_overview: 故事描述超人的頭號宿敵雷克斯計劃消滅超人的超能力，而超人也終於認清一個令他傷心欲絕的事實，那就是他最愛的女人露薏絲已經不再愛他，決定永遠消失在他的生命中，或者仍有挽回的機會？  超人重返地球後，除了想要再度拉近他和露薏絲之間的距離之外，也要試著活在一個早已學會不需要他的世界生活。但是在地球發生危機時，超人必須保護這個他熱愛的世界不被壞人摧毀，於是他踏上一場前所未見的冒險歷程，從最深的海底一直到最遙遠的外太空，試圖尋找自己存在的意義。
tmdb_overview_en: Superman returns to discover his 5-year absence has allowed Lex Luthor to walk free, and that those he was closest to felt abandoned and have moved on. Luthor plots his ultimate revenge that could see millions killed and change the face of the planet forever, as well as ridding himself of the Man of Steel.

tmdb_overview: During the summer of 2022, Anna and Valeriia, two estranged Ukrainian step-sisters, meet again at a military training camp in Germany. Anna works as a translator, and Valeriia joins the exercises as a soldier before deployment to the front. Anna knows that this may be their last chance to reunite and feel like the family they have never been.

synopsis: 米勒彗星來的這一天，8個朋友相聚一起晚餐，許久不見的他們開始天南地北的聊著。 突然大家眼前一黑，似乎因為彗星的關係，讓整個街區都停電了，除了兩個街口外的一間房子還亮著燈。 於是他們決定前往一探究竟，順便借電話聯繫一下，但一連串詭異事件也開始陸續發生...

tmdb_overview: 在前往與友人相聚晚餐的路上，艾蜜莉的手機突然沒電且螢幕無故爆裂，整晚令人匪夷所思的事件陸續發生。餐桌上的八人，表面上都是相交多年的老朋友，卻各有各的愛恨情仇。而在彗星即將經過且又因此突然造成大停電，眾人驚慌之餘，發現幾條街外只剩一戶人家有燈光，於是前往求援，竟赫然發現裡面也是一桌八人的朋友聚會，而那些人，長得和他們一模一樣！ 於是彼此猜疑與暗鬥就此展開…

synopsis: ★2025 絲路國際電影節最佳動畫 ★全球票房4千3百萬臺幣 ★《刺客聯盟》、《吸血鬼獵人：林肯總統》視覺特效維克多格魯胡辛導演作品 馬拉庫達是部落首領之子，努力想達到父親期望，為了證明自己，他獨自踏進原始森林，意外遇見擁有魔法的外星鳥叮叮，展開驚險歡樂的冒險旅程，某次意外叮叮不小心把馬拉庫達的父親變成毛毛蟲，為了讓叮叮學會控制魔力，也為了恢復父親原本的模樣，馬拉庫達必須學習負起責任，他的父親則逐漸放下嚴厲。 https://reurl.cc/yORQKE
synopsis_en:
★ Best Animation at the 2025 Silk Road International Film Festival ★ Global Box Office: 43 Million TWD ★ Directed by Victor Glukhushin, visual effects artist for *Wanted* and *Abraham Lincoln: Vampire Hunter*.

Malakuda, the son of a tribal chief, struggles to live up to his father’s high expectations. Determined to prove his worth, he ventures alone into a primeval forest, where he unexpectedly encounters Ding-Ding, an alien bird endowed with magical powers. Together, they embark on a thrilling and whimsical adventure. However, when Ding-Ding accidentally transforms Malakuda’s father into a caterpillar, the stakes are raised. To help Ding-Ding master his magic and restore his father to his original form, Malakuda must learn to take responsibility, while his father gradually learns to let go of his sternness.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 1986 法國凱薩獎最佳影片、最佳男配角 Best Film & Best Supporting Actor, César du cinéma 1986 奧斯卡金像獎最佳外語片提名 Nominated for Best Foreign Language Film, Academy Awards 1987 金球獎最佳外語片提名 Nominated for Best Foreign Language Film, Golden Globe Awards 巴黎市中心的公寓裡，合租的皮耶、米榭和賈克擁抱他們的單身生活，放蕩不羈地享受派對和溫柔鄉。狂歡中，賈克的朋友鬼鬼祟祟，委託他明天幫忙留意收重要的「包裹」。隨口答應後，賈克赫然想起自己也得出遠門，離開前匆匆交代兩位室友便出發了。誰知隔天皮耶和米榭打開門，與包裹裡搖籃中的那雙水汪汪大眼對視，直接原地傻眼——怎麼會是小寶包？！ 三個單身漢在成人世界有多瀟灑，照顧小嬰兒就有多狼狽。柯琳瑟沃擅長以反差製造幽默，同時質疑傳統社會對家庭角色與性別分工的刻板印象。本片法國票房一度超越《第一滴血》，紅到被好萊塢翻拍成美國版《三個奶爸一個娃》。

In an apartment in the heart of Paris, roommates Pierre, Michel, and Jacques fully embrace their bachelorhood, living a carefree life of parties and romance. Amidst the revelry, a friend of Jacques’s sneakily asks him for a favor: to look out for an important "package" arriving the next day. Jacques agrees without a second thought, only to realize he has to leave town himself. He hastily leaves instructions for his two roommates and departs.

The next day, Pierre and Michel open the door and find themselves staring into a pair of wide, innocent eyes looking up from a cradle. They are utterly shell-shocked—how could the "package" be a baby?!

As suave as these three bachelors are in the adult world, they are completely out of their depth when it comes to caring for an infant. Director Coline Serreau masterfully uses contrast to generate humor while challenging traditional societal stereotypes regarding family roles and gendered divisions of labor. A massive box office hit in France that even outperformed *First Blood*, the film was famously remade by Hollywood as *Three Men and a Baby*.

movie_title: 夢想巨無霸【國語配音版】
synopsis: 東東是與眾不同的十歲孤兒，經常因身材與外貌遭同學嘲笑與排擠。父母留給他一本滿載神奇故事的故事書，成為他心靈的避風港，也點燃他內心的勇氣與夢想。學校即將舉辦年度才藝表演，東東決定以書中的奇幻故事編排一場舞台劇，希望透過表演贏得大家認同。就在他全心準備時，珍貴的故事書卻被偷走。當舞台燈光亮起，東東能否突破重重困難，展現最真實勇敢的自己？而那本故事書，最終又能否重回他的手中呢？
source_language_note: 發音/字幕： 中文發音/中文字幕
tmdb_overview: 東東是與眾不同的十歲孤兒，常因外貌被排擠。父母留下的故事書成為他的夢想源泉，他決定改編故事參加學校才藝表演。正當他全心準備，故事書卻被偷走。所幸有奶奶與摯友的陪伴，給予他力量與支持，並遇見神秘小精靈，展開一段跨越夢境與現實的旅程。這場冒險帶領東東重新認識自己，也教會他勇敢面對恐懼與孤獨。
tmdb_overview_en: Desperate to prove to his peers that he’s more than a chubby kid that never wins at anything, little Don wishes to win his local talent show by performing a stageplay inspired from a storybook written by his late parents. When unfortunately a bully stole that book, at the same time a little ghost appeared from the spirit world asking for Don’s help to reunite her with her parents’ spirits. The two new friends then embark on an exciting adventure to help each other and learn the true meaning of friendship.

synopsis: 在一個人類早已不再做夢的世界裡，有一個怪物依然整日沉迷於逐漸消散的夢境幻影之中，而孤身迷失在無盡的遐想裡，執著於那些世人再也無法目睹的景象。直到一位擁有看穿幻覺能力的神秘女子出現，她決定潛入怪物的夢境深處，尋找隱藏其中足以翻轉時空記憶的秘密與真相。

movie_title_en: Mama, There's a Man in Your Bed
synopsis: 1991 英國影藝學院獎最佳非英語片提名 Nominated for Best Film not in the English Language, BAFTA Awards 茱麗葉在食品公司當清潔工，每天敬業打掃著夜深人靜的辦公室，偶爾發現一些老闆們的小秘密，也置若罔聞。人生勝利組羅慕歐是食品公司的總裁，遭下屬嫉妒而被陷害，被警察通緝，落魄到無家可歸。誰能想到，茱麗葉擠滿五個蘿蔔頭的小屋，竟成了羅慕歐的避難所，而茱麗葉的機智和多年累積的小道消息是他最後的浮木，兩人合作要揭開所有陰謀的真相！ 本片在辦公室政治以及階級差異之中，埋藏一段關於真誠與人性內涵的動人情緣。女主角茱麗葉由素人飾演，富有韌性與智慧的角色，將渺小又普通的小人物展現得唯妙唯肖，極具說服力，且散發令人會心一笑的正能量。 As a diligent janitor of a food company, Juliette comes across dirty little secrets while cleaning executive offices, and keeps them to herself. Romuald, the president of the food company, is oblivious to the schemes of subordinates and his wife’s infidelity. When framed with a food-poisoning scandal, Romuald seeks sanctuary in Juliette’s humble lodging, sharing the bed with her five kids from five ex-husbands. To regain control of the company, Romuald must rely on Juliette, who acts as his spy to carry out their counter-scheme.
source_language_note: 發音：法語 字幕：中字▲ ▲ 影片拷貝非英語發音且無英文字幕 Non-English language film without English subtitles.
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
synopsis_en:
Nominated for Best Film Not in the English Language at the 1991 BAFTA Awards. 

Juliette is a dedicated janitor at a food company, spending her nights cleaning quiet offices and turning a blind eye to the corporate secrets she occasionally uncovers. Romuald, the company’s high-flying CEO, sees his life unravel when he is framed by jealous subordinates and becomes a fugitive from the law. In a twist of fate, Juliette’s modest home—crowded with her five children—becomes Romuald’s only refuge. Armed with Juliette’s sharp wit and years of accumulated office gossip, the unlikely pair joins forces to uncover the truth behind the conspiracy. 

Set against a backdrop of office politics and class disparity, the film weaves a moving tale of sincerity and human spirit. Portrayed by a non-professional actress, Juliette is a resilient and wise character who brings a convincing, heartwarming energy to this story of an ordinary person facing extraordinary odds.

tmdb_overview: 華特米堤 是個平凡、每天記帳的42歲上班族宅男，他是美國生活雜誌底片資產部經理，華特唯一的嗜好就是不斷在做白日夢，幻想自己以帥哥姿態征服冰河、在爆炸大樓現場化身超級英雄救出小狗，他日復一日重複著一成不變的生活。 但他發現自己暗戀上剛來的正妹同事，卻不知如何和她告白。此時生活雜誌已被併購、即將轉型為網路雜誌，全公司面臨人心惶惶的大裁員，華特卻弄丟了最後一期的雜誌封面底片，而過渡部經理要求他限期交出底片，否則馬上走人。 華特面對現實世界的最大考驗時，他決定去尋找行蹤飄忽不定的攝影師尚恩歐康諾 拿回底片，讓自己展開一段壯闊、奇幻的冒險歷程！

tmdb_overview: 阿鳳（高宇蓁 飾）離鄉十多年未曾返家，原以為可以當歌星賺錢養家，卻因為受人蛇拐賣而在茶室工作。偶然間成為警察的弟弟（黃冠智 飾）出現，又在遭拐騙販賣的少女送進茶室時，彷彿看見曾經的自己，決定伸出援手的她，卻陷入更糾結的命運⋯⋯
tmdb_overview_en: Feng runs away from her rural home to pursue singing in Taipei but is trafficked to Japan as a prostitute. Years later, she returns to Taiwan, burdened by guilt and avoiding her family while secretly sending money home. Her brother Ming, now a police officer, searches for her, unaware of the life she now leads. Their paths cross under difficult circumstances, forcing both siblings to confront their past and present.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 2002 挪威影評人獎 Norwegian Film Critics' Award 2002 羅德岱堡影展首獎、最佳原創劇本 Grand Prize & Most Original Screenplay, Fort Lauderdale IFF 2002 法國凱薩獎最有潛力女演員 Most Promising Actress, César du cinéma 白領夫妻保羅和海倫開車 途中 ，貌似妓女的女子突然衝上來，拍著車窗向他們求救。後方的小混混快速追上，女子被毆打，昏迷倒地。 保羅怕惹上麻煩，趕緊 離開現場，並阻止海倫叫救護車。事後海倫心懷愧疚，決定拋家棄子前往醫院，照顧暫時癱瘓的女子直到康復。 不料，那些小混混赫然現身醫院，想趁人之危，逼女子簽一份神秘合約，瞬間將良家婦女海倫捲入一場攸關性命、金錢和感情的人生賭注。 柯琳瑟沃以其豐富的藝術背景，證明創作不需要侷限於任何特定類型 ，而是專注尋找最適合的表現手法。一改1970至1990年代擅長的喜劇風格，本片透露著狠勁，塑造出強而有力的寫實敘述。 Casually driving through the streets one evening, a bourgeois couple, Paul and Hélène, sees a prostitute being chased and beaten down by abusive men. Anxious to stay away from trouble, Paul locks out the prostitute and stops Hélène from calling an ambulance. Gnawed by guilt, Hélène decides to leave work and family responsibilities to nurse the prostitute back to health. As the prostitute gradually regains mobility and speech, she reveals her true identity, followed by a mind-blowing plan that would change everyone's lives.

synopsis: Rob是一間芝加哥唱片行的老闆，音樂是他與另外兩位員工Dick及Barry的最愛，但瘋狂的三人常常因為和顧客因為音樂的喜好不同而把他們趕出去，連帶也讓唱片行原本不太好的生意更加每況愈下..... 老實說，Rob不僅不太會經營生意，他也不太會談戀愛。在現任女友Laura也決定離開後，Rob開始意識到他總是被甩的那一個。 於是他痛定思痛，決定重新審視過往的幾段戀情.....

movie_title: 大開眼戒－早安！周日經典電影院
tmdb_overview: 醫生哈維與在藝廊工作的的太太愛麗絲是一對人人稱羨的富裕夫妻。一天夜晚，在一次晚宴結束後，哈維故意和愛麗絲討論他與不同女病人之間打情罵俏的狀況，想藉此調侃老婆愛麗絲，沒想到愛麗絲竟然向他坦白，說自己也曾經幻想和另一個男人做愛，這使得哈維非常痛苦。 自此之後，老婆愛麗絲和別人親熱的畫面便常在哈維的腦海中盤桓不去，而他也開始流連於可以滿足他幻想慾望的情慾場所，而無法自拔……
tmdb_overview_en: After Dr. Bill Harford's wife, Alice, admits to having sexual fantasies about a man she met, Bill becomes obsessed with having a sexual encounter. He discovers an underground sexual group and attends one of their meetings -- and quickly discovers that he is in over his head.

country: 日本、法國、新加坡、菲律賓、印尼
synopsis: （註：本片分級為輔12） ★2023 東京影展最佳導演、觀眾票選獎；最佳影片提名 ★2023 金馬影展 ★《王牌大律師》、《月薪嬌妻》新垣結衣，《在窗邊》、《那個女孩》稻垣吾郎領銜主演 討厭社交渴望消失的上班族男子，父母意外雙亡只好返回故鄉廣島；年過三十仍與父母同住廣島的單身女子，對「水」有著非一般的欲望；念小學的男孩毅然決定離開校園並經營影音頻道，檢察官父親暗地裡抗拒掙扎；對異性恐懼的女大生及獨來獨往的男舞者。這些看似無關的人，有著為社會所不容的特殊癖好，而一段普通的孩童戲水影片，卻引發了尋常社會的不安。 https://reurl.cc/4lL1eL
tmdb_overview: 夏月在日本當地商場的寢具店工作，生活平淡無奇，某天她得知老朋友佳道回到了故鄉，檢察官啟喜則有個不去上學的兒子，而八重子是個害羞的大學生，她喜歡英俊帥氣的熱舞社成員大也，這些看似無關的人，卻因為啟喜兒子的一段影片而有了交集，他們漸漸發現自己的（非）一般欲望並不容於這個社會。
tmdb_overview_en: Director Yoshiyuki Kishi and screenwriter Takehito Minato—the team behind acclaimed boxing epic Wilderness—reunite to adapt Ryo Asai's prize-winning novel. A sensitive drama about the aberrant in a society without regard for diversity, the story unites characters trying to hide abnormalities: a prosecutor who is worried that his pubescent son is a shut-in, an introverted saleswoman with a peculiar habit, and a student tortured by feelings she can’t express. In a world fill with abnormalities, what if it’s actually normal to be abnormal?

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 綠星人舉辦一年一次的高峰會，討論要派誰去其他星球考察，唯有地球乏人問津。自19世紀後未再造訪的綠星人，被今日的地球嚇壞了！滿街跑著名為「車」的詭異物體、仍在使用金錢的落後文明……面對種種艱困條件，誰會想去啦！當會議陷入僵局，咪拉舉手自願前往，原來她擁有一半地球人血統，想藉著此次機會，更瞭解關於逝世母親生長的故鄉。但降落在巴黎的她，不但搞不清東西南北，更無視地球人的規則。於是，一場橫衝直撞 、 大鬧花都的冒險，就此展開。 柯琳瑟沃身兼導演和演員，在片中飾演女主角咪拉。和諧又單純的烏托邦，對比被物質、科技所支配的地球，導演透過外星人的文化衝擊，諷刺人類與環境和彼此之間的疏離關係，對人類福祉提出大哉問。 An annual summit gathers the inhabitants of the Green Planet, a utopian planet, to call out volunteers for planetary scouts. The discussion comes down to the planet with the most unflattering reputation: Earth. No one has gone for 200 years; their impression of Earthlings are primitives who use money and travel in bizarre contraptions called “cars .”
source_language_note: 發音：法語 字幕： ▲ 影片拷貝非英語發音且無英文字幕 Non-English language film without English subtitles.
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
synopsis_en:
The inhabitants of the Green Planet hold an annual summit to decide who will be sent on scouting missions to other planets, but Earth is the one place nobody wants to go. Having not visited since the 19th century, the Green Planet people are horrified by modern-day Earth. With streets swarming with bizarre objects called "cars" and a backward civilization that still uses money, no one is willing to face such grueling conditions.

As the meeting reaches a stalemate, Mila raises her hand to volunteer. It turns out she is half-human and wants to use this opportunity to learn more about the world where her late mother was born and raised. But after landing in Paris, she finds herself completely disoriented and blissfully indifferent to human rules. Thus begins a chaotic, whirlwind adventure through the City of Light.

Coline Serreau serves as both director and lead actress, portraying Mila. By contrasting a harmonious, simple utopia with an Earth dominated by materialism and technology, the director uses alien culture shock to satirize the alienation between humans, their environment, and one another, posing profound questions about the true meaning of human well-being.

movie_title: 【嬰兒車電影院】喵狗麻吉團 (國語)
tmdb_overview: 一隻帥氣且愛唱歌、有點自大的家貓莫希意外走失，必須與她最不想理會的「悲劇搭檔」一隻超搞笑的狗狗和一隻老成的鳥兒，一同踏上爆笑又暖心的冒險旅程！
tmdb_overview_en: From the cobbled streets of Paris to the wild countryside of Europe, follow Miss Moxy — a pampered cat with a whole lot of cattitude — as she’s thrown into the adventure of a lifetime. Lost far from home, she must team up with a goofy dog and a wise old bird to find her way back… and discover who she truly is along the way.

synopsis: 伊娃正與新伴侶納薩里奧及他的女兒艾莉西亞過著幸福的生活。然而，與前夫荷西的重逢後，卻打開了一連串複雜情勢的大門，讓她踏上一段充滿恐懼的旅程，並為所有人帶來可怕的後果。一切都不像表面所見，每個人所見的，都是各自平行的真相。
source_language_note: 發音/字幕： 西班牙語/中文字幕
tmdb_overview: 伊娃正與新伴侶納薩里奧以及他的女兒艾莉西亞過著幸福的生活。然而，與前夫荷西的重逢後，卻打開了一連串複雜情勢的大門，讓她踏上一段充滿恐懼的旅程，並為所有人帶來可怕的後果。一切都不像表面所見，每個人所見的，都是各自平行的真相。
tmdb_overview_en: Eva is in a happy moment of her life with her new partner, Nazario, and his daughter Alicia. But an encounter with her ex, José, opens the door to complicated situations that will send her on a journey of fear that has terrible consequences for everyone. Nothing is what it seems.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 小鎮上突然出現一隻獨角獸，麵包店的女兒奧潔塔好奇地跟在後面，意外踏進魔幻森林，卻受到巫師羅伯特的詛咒，變成一隻天鵝。在仙后的幫助下，奧潔塔能在夜晚恢復成人型，但只要太陽升起便會失效。仙后告訴奧潔塔，她是被魔法水晶選中的人，能夠對抗羅伯特強大的法力，然而奧潔塔天生害羞又缺乏自信，她開始懷疑自己真的能拯救魔法森林，解開詛咒嗎？ 改編自彼得柴可夫斯基的著名芭蕾舞劇《天鵝湖》，芭比飾演天鵝湖公主奧潔塔。在月光下隨著音樂翩翩起舞，奧潔塔為拯救魔幻森林的夥伴，相信自己一定可以，即便面對強大的巫師，也不退縮。
source_language_note: 發音：國語 字幕：中字▲ ▲ 影片拷貝非英語發音且無英文字幕 Non-English language film without English subtitles.
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
tmdb_overview: Barbie as Odette, the young daughter of a baker, follows a unicorn into the Enchanted Forest and is transformed into a swan by an evil wizard intent on defeating the Fairy Queen.
tmdb_overview_en: Barbie as Odette, the young daughter of a baker, follows a unicorn into the Enchanted Forest and is transformed into a swan by an evil wizard intent on defeating the Fairy Queen.

tmdb_overview: 落魄的私家偵探歐陽偉業收到委託：旅行社老闆要求他調查自己的女朋友，而她竟是歐陽偉業的妻子關詠心，敵不過內心煎熬，他放棄為另一個客戶尋找失蹤未婚妻，趕往酒店捉姦，沒想到客戶的未婚妻在他離開現場後被殺，原以為普通出軌事件竟變成謀殺案！為阻止兇手殺害下一個目標，歐陽偉業必須力挽狂瀾。
tmdb_overview_en: Au Yeung Wai Yip is a private detective who has been focusing on missing persons and adultery investigations for many years. One day, he received a "special" commission: the owner of the travel agency had asked him to investigate his girlfriend, who happened to be Au Yeung Wai Yip’s wife.Being a private detective, he is used to looking for the truth with cold eyes for his clients, but he finds it difficult to face the truth about their own marriage. Unable to withstand his inner torment, Au Yeung Wai Yip gave up on another ongoing case - a client's search for his missing fiancée - and went to the hotel to catch the adulterer. Unfortunately, the marriage could not be saved in the end, and the client's fiancée was killed after he left. A seemingly ordinary affair turned into a murderous incident!

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 1978 西班牙Valladolid影 展最 佳影片 Best Film, Valladolid IFF 1978 芝加哥影展最佳影片入圍 Nominated for Best Feature, Chicago IFF 兩男一女同住一個屋簷下，關係親密無間，是朋友，也是家人，更是戀人，共同經營著信任又溫馨的非典型戀情。家庭主夫費爾南負責洗衣煮飯，愛麗絲是家裡的經濟支柱，而路易則全心創作和演奏他摯愛的音樂。在關係裡，比起慾望，能在彼此低潮時互相扶持，就是幸福。直到費爾南突然帶回一位漂亮女孩，三加一的同居生活，即將熱鬧起來。 柯琳瑟沃首部劇情長片處女作溫柔地擁抱禁忌議題，然而這個位處巴黎郊區的烏托邦，差點無法在大銀幕問世。1970年代時，導演帶著驚世駭俗的劇本，屢次碰壁，經過鍥而不捨的努力，爭取到拍攝補助計畫，讓社會見識到一段比三角戀更純真的多元關係。 Nestled in the suburbs of Paris, Fernand, Alexa, and Louis share a delicate polyamorous relationship. Fernand manages the household, while Alexa is the breadwinner, thereby allowing Louis to explore his musical talents. Happiness is found in the simplicity of each other’s company, just as important as sleeping together. But life would have been perfect had Fernand not abruptly left home and returned with the beautiful Sylvie, the fourth addition to this unconventional relationship.
source_language_note: 發音：法語 字幕：中英字
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
synopsis_en:
Best Film, 1978 Valladolid International Film Festival
Nominated for Best Feature, Chicago International Film Festival

Two men and one woman live under the same roof in a bond that transcends boundaries—they are friends, family, and lovers all at once, navigating a warm, unconventional relationship built on trust. Fernand is the househusband who handles the cooking and cleaning, Alexa is the breadwinner, and Louis devotes himself entirely to his music. In their world, true happiness is found less in fleeting desire and more in the way they anchor one another through life’s lows. Their delicate balance is shifted when Fernand unexpectedly brings home a beautiful young woman, turning their trio into a lively household of four.

Coline Serreau’s debut feature film tenderly embraces taboo subjects, yet this suburban Parisian utopia almost never made it to the big screen. In the 1970s, Serreau faced constant rejection for her "scandalous" script. Through sheer persistence, she eventually secured the funding to bring this story to life, offering audiences a glimpse into a polyamorous relationship that is purer and more profound than any typical love triangle.

synopsis: Bianca是全校最火紅的美女，盼望愛情的她和老爸大吵大鬧，只為了能想和心儀的男生約會。 於是老爸定下了這麼個規定: 「當姊姊Kate開始跟男生約會時，你才能開始跟男生約會。」 偏偏姊姊是全校最出名的怪咖惡女... 這時一心暗戀Bianca的Cameron想出了一個絕招，他決定付錢請全校最酷、最兇狠的Patrick去追Kate，如此一來他就能順理成章的約Bianca參加畢業舞會了! 各種笑鬧與瘋狂，讓Kate與Patrick彼此逐漸卸下心房，但這時Kate卻發現原來這場浪漫的戀愛只是有代價的一場交易...
screen_name: Dream Plaza R樓
source_language_note: 中文字幕，原文發音
tmdb_overview: 史塞福家老爸有條苛刻的規定，妹妹畢安卡在高中畢業前不得有約會，除非怪胎姊姊凱特先找到約會的對象。這可是個難題，因為沒有人願意跟凱特約會。  新來的轉學生柯邁隆對畢安卡一見鍾情，在得知史家的規定後，與死黨麥克決定利用也喜歡畢安卡的大帥哥喬依的錢財，買通校園裡另一個公認的大怪胎派崔克去約凱特，怎料凱特兇猛無比連派崔克都難以將其馴服！到底柯邁隆能否如願以償地與畢安卡約會呢？
tmdb_overview_en: On the first day at his new school, Cameron instantly falls for Bianca, the gorgeous girl of his dreams. The only problem is that Bianca is forbidden to date until her ill-tempered, completely un-dateable older sister Kat goes out, too. In an attempt to solve his problem, Cameron singles out the only guy who could possibly be a match for Kat: a mysterious bad boy with a nasty reputation of his own.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 1989 金馬獎最佳男配角 Best Supporting Actor, Golden Horse Awards 國共內戰尾聲，患難與共的門栓與得勝以假身分隨軍撤到臺灣。白色恐怖的亂世變數連綿，兩人數度落難。門栓在逃亡中遇見寡婦月香和新生兒耀華，他假冒成孩子的父親，以借來的文憑顛沛求職過活。盛產香蕉的寶島上演著非天堂式的荒誕與荒涼，那些借來的多重身分竟也不知不覺陪伴了一輩子……。 這是王童書寫庶民生活「臺灣近代三部曲」的第二部，以黑色幽默述說外省人漂移臺灣的流離處境與身分認同。
source_language_note: 發音：國語、台語 字幕：中字
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
synopsis_en:
1989 Golden Horse Award for Best Supporting Actor.

As the Chinese Civil War draws to a close, comrades-in-arms Men-shuan and De-sheng retreat to Taiwan with the army under assumed identities. Amidst the chaos and uncertainty of the White Terror era, the two face constant misfortune. While on the run, Men-shuan encounters a widow, Yue-xiang, and her newborn son, Yao-hua. He poses as the child's father and scrapes by, using a borrowed diploma to find work. On this "Treasure Island" famous for its bananas, a far-from-heavenly tale of absurdity and desolation unfolds, where borrowed identities unexpectedly become a lifelong reality. This is the second installment of director Wang Tung’s "Taiwan Modern Trilogy" focusing on the lives of common people, using black humor to depict the displacement and identity crises of Mainlanders adrift in Taiwan.

synopsis: Rosie與Alex從小就是無話不說的青梅竹馬兼好友，他們總是為彼此著想，也確認過眼神，是對的人。 他們誰都不願意，也不敢踏出改變關係的那一步，但此時Rosie卻意外發現自己懷孕，並決心隱瞞要前往波士頓唸書的Alex。 在此之後，他們的人生看似走向了截然不同的道路，但心裡卻始終無法放下對於彼此的感情...
screen_name: Dream Plaza R樓
source_language_note: 中文字幕，原文發音
tmdb_overview: 本片改編自《P.S. 我愛妳》作者另一暢銷力作《我一直都在》（Where Rainbows End），由好萊塢新生代演員莉莉柯林斯及山姆克萊弗林領銜主演。探討兩性之間的永恆命題：男女之間的關係，到底可不可能如純友誼那般簡單？  蘿西（莉莉柯林斯 飾）和艾利克斯（山姆克萊弗林飾）從五歲開始就是死黨，他們一起蹺課、一起惡作劇、一起幫對方慶生，她懂他帶笑的眼神傳達了什麼訊息，他也知道她微揚的嘴角透露了什麼祕密，他們分分秒秒都膩在一起，雖然不是男女朋友，眼中卻只有彼此，而且他們很清楚，沒有人能取代對方在自己心中的地位。  但談到愛情、人生及做出正確抉擇，蘿西和艾利克斯就變得不知所措，像是18歲生日時出包、錯過大好機會，而他們各自的生活也使兩人變得漸行漸遠。  不過命運自有安排，經過了一段時間和旅居異國的歷程，儘管他們遭遇了意外懷孕、悲慘戀愛、婚姻、外遇、離婚，兩人未了的緣分似乎仍緊密相連。那麼，他們會回頭找到彼此嗎？或是為時已晚？
tmdb_overview_en: Since the moment they met at age 5, Rosie and Alex have been best friends, facing the highs and lows of growing up side by side. A fleeting shared moment, one missed opportunity, and the decisions that follow send their lives in completely different directions. As each navigates the complexities of life, love, and everything in between, they always find their way back to each other - but is it just friendship, or something more?

synopsis_en: In the late 19th century, a Danish priest travels to a remote part of Iceland with the mission of building a church and photographing its people. As he treks across the rugged, unforgiving landscape, the overwhelming forces of nature begin to erode his faith and ideals. Even as he settles into a small community to begin his ministry, the deeper he immerses himself in local life, the more he is confronted by human nature and temptation. Like the inverted images in a camera obscura, these forces distort his sense of purpose, leaving him adrift. With the harsh winter fast approaching, where will this journey ultimately lead him?

synopsis: （註：本片分級為輔15） ★2025 坎城影展評審團大獎；金棕櫚獎提名 ★2025 奧斯卡最佳國際影片德國代表 ★2025 歐洲電影獎最佳電影、最佳編劇等8項大獎提名 百年的時間跨度裡，一個家族、四個不同時代的女孩：艾爾瑪、艾瑞卡、安潔莉卡和蘭卡，都在同一個德國北部的農莊，各自度過了她們的青春歲月。從一戰前夕到二戰陰影、八零年代的東德再到現今，這座農莊隨之更迭，然而她們的生命卻神秘交織。往日的聲響仍在牆間迴盪，命運的壓迫、家族的秘密、過往的創傷，如幽靈般在時間的裂縫中蔓延，潛伏於四個女孩的意識裡，直至時光彷彿彼此疊映消融...... https://reurl.cc/O6Y4qR
tmdb_overview: 百年的時間跨度裡，一個家族、四個不同時代的女孩：艾爾瑪、艾瑞卡、安潔莉卡和蘭卡，都在同一個德國北部的農莊，各自度過了她們的青春歲月。從一戰前夕到二戰陰影、八零年代的東德再到現今，這座農莊隨之更迭，然而她們的生命卻神秘交織。往日的聲響仍在牆間迴盪，命運的壓迫、家族的秘密、過往的創傷，如幽靈般在時間的裂縫中蔓延，潛伏於四個女孩的意識裡，直至時光彷彿彼此疊映消融⋯⋯。
tmdb_overview_en: Four adolescent girls each spend their youth in the same farmhouse over the last century. Though separated by decades, resonances between their lives emerge: their desires and distress, secrets and truths, encounters with another’s gaze and defiant gaze in return.

movie_title: 像我這樣的愛情 索
synopsis: 阿妹天生患有腦性麻痺，性格卻異常跳脫樂觀，閒時會約朋友畫畫作樂。可是過度保護的母親堅決安排她進行子宮切除手術，阿妹努力建立的生活再次失去平衡。在朋友推薦下，她找到了一個專為殘疾人士提供性服務的自發組織，並認識了義工Ken。這無私的相遇彷彿撫慰了兩個受傷的靈魂，這樣的關係，是愛嗎？
source_language_note: 語言 粵語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 我們這樣，是愛嗎？阿妹天生患有腦性麻痹，性格卻異常跳脫樂觀，閑時會約朋友踩板吹水，畫畫作樂，二十多年來一直努力不被身體耽誤。可是過度保護的母親堅決安排她進行子宮切除手術，阿妹努力建立的生活再次失去平衡，她的身體永遠是不由自主的。在朋友推薦下，阿妹找到了一個專為殘疾人士提供性服務的自發組織，並認識了義工Ken。這無私的相遇仿佛撫慰了兩個受傷的靈魂，那日漸累積的情愫衝淡了道德與身體的羁絆，這樣的關系，是愛嗎？ 　　譚惠貞繼《以青春的名義》（第14屆開幕電影）後第二部長片作品，將愛情元素和身障者性權益議題融合，成就一個道德探索與自我尋找的故事。
tmdb_overview_en: A young woman living with cerebral palsy discovers newfound independence and self-acceptance through her encounters with a specialized organization that helps people with disabilities explore their sexuality.

synopsis: 故事改編自真實事件，揭露隱藏在新聞背後、鮮為人知的殘疾院舍真相，新聞社接獲一宗有關殘疾院舍「彩橋之家」虐待院友的線報，偵查小組為揭露殘疾院舍監管問題，記者曉琪潛入院舍，揭發內裡的非人道生活，尋找日光之下的殘酷真相。
source_language_note: 語言 粵語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 記者可以改變世界嗎？2015年，新聞社接獲線報，殘疾院舍「彩橋之家」疑似虐待院友。偵查組記者曉琪偽裝院友孫女，潛入院舍調查，不料背後隱藏的真相卻越滾越大，也撼動了她日益麻木的職業理想。爾冬陞監製，香港導演簡君晋取材真實新聞事件，揭開白日之下無人問津的監管亂象與殘酷暗角。《緣路山旮旯》余香凝幹練出演片中外冷心熱的記者，堅守公義良知。
tmdb_overview_en: Kay is a tough-as-nails investigative reporter, and goes undercover at a home for the disabled based on a tip about staff abuse of the residents. She not only corroborates the frightening allegations but also discovers how disastrously flawed Hong Kong’s health care system is, especially for those who cannot care for themselves. However, after her story breaks, further unspeakable truths are revealed leading Kay on a dire crusade for justice.

synopsis: ★2023 釜山影展 ★2024 日本電影影評人大獎最佳導演、最佳女主角雙料大獎得主 ★2024 金馬奇幻影展 早起、購物、煮飯、餵食，依子一成不變的平凡日常圍繞著丈夫、兒子和公公打轉，直到某日丈夫因恐懼核電輻射一去不復返，公公離世、兒子離家，有了喘息時間的她，全身心投入新興宗教，巧手打理庭院的造景漣漪，只求心靈平靜，然而丈夫與兒子的相繼回歸，卻又將她推向暗黑邊緣。 https://reurl.cc/grRM2b
tmdb_overview: 早起、購物、煮飯、餵食，依子一成不變的平凡日常圍繞著丈夫、兒子和公公打轉，直到某日丈夫因恐懼核電輻射一去不復返。公公離世、兒子離家，有了喘息時間的她，全身心投入新興宗敎，巧手打理庭院的造景漣漪，只求心靈平靜。然而丈夫與兒子的相繼回歸，卻又將她推向暗黑邊緣。
tmdb_overview_en: Yoriko Sudo believes in a new religious group Midoriinochikai, that worships water. She lives peacefully, devoting herself to the group daily.

synopsis: 改編自真實事件，1978年的阿富汗，正值社會主義轉型時期，一對形影不離的好朋友蘇拉雅和希瑪，蘇拉雅是出身富裕的共產主義者，而希瑪則是保守的穆斯林，即便是政治立場不同，卻完全不影響兩人的情誼，而在隨後蘇聯入侵以及反蘇聯勢力崛起的動盪中，兩個人經歷了人生和命運的巨變。
source_language_note: 語言 波斯、達里語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 1978年的阿富汗，正值社會主義轉型時期，一對形影不離的好朋友蘇拉雅和希瑪，蘇拉雅是出身富裕的共產主義者，而希瑪則是保守的穆斯林，即便是政治立場不同，卻完全不影響兩人的情誼。而在隨後蘇聯入侵以及反蘇聯勢力崛起的動盪中，兩個人經歷了人生和命運的巨變。
tmdb_overview_en: With the Cold War about to break out in Afghanistan, young, lifelong friends Suraya and Sima must question their life choices and moral principles when they get involved in opposite sides of the conflict.

synopsis: ★2024 蘇黎世影展觀眾票選最佳兒童電影 ★2024 德國SCHLiNGEL國際兒少影展 ★2019德國動畫電影《烘焙小精靈》續集 當埃爾菲發現存在一個科技超前且前所未見的精靈族群時，她的世界發生了天翻地覆的變化。這個精靈族群與埃爾菲自己的部落形成鮮明對比，在享受日常的樂趣和尋求刺激方面都非常讓人嚮往。另一方面赫爾維與幫派最年輕成員博的友誼能否讓兩個精靈族群在 250 多年後和解？ https://reurl.cc/zQqM4a
tmdb_original_title: Die Heinzels: Neue Mützen, Neue Mission
tmdb_overview: 小精靈小飛嚮往希望打破「默默助人」的傳統，這樣的想法讓保守的族人們大感不滿，某天，小飛遇見來自另一個精靈族的小波，小波的族群熱愛刺激，善用高科技道具做大膽的事，這也讓他們成了警探蘭絲琪和警貓丸子的眼中釘，小飛與小波的友誼，能否化解兩個族群長達250年的恩怨，並讓她實現夢想呢？
tmdb_overview_en: Helvi's world is turned upside down when she discovers the existence of a technically advanced Elfkin gang that, in stark contrast to Elfie’s own clan, is second to none when it comes to fun and thrill-seeking. Can Helvi’s friendship with Bo, the youngest gang member, reconcile the two Elfkin clans after more than 250 years?

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 1993 法國凱薩獎最佳原創或改編劇本 Best Screenplay, Original or Adaptation, César du cinéma 1993 格拉馬杜電影節最佳剪輯 Best Editing, Gramado FF 1994 佩尼伊斯科拉喜劇影展最佳影片 Best Film, Peñíscola Comedy FF 所謂禍不單行，中年男子維多在一天之內，遭遇老婆離家出走和被資遣的雙重打擊。維多想找親朋好友討拍，同時到處打聽老婆的下落，但所有人都被各自的煩惱纏身，沒有多餘的心力聽他傾訴 。 滿腹委屈有苦難言，他只能 獨自跟酒吧裡的街友米薯取暖，讓心情得到慰藉。然而當 米薯 開始黏著他，怎麼甩都甩不掉，維多感覺人生從來沒有這麼當機過。 儘管維多不想承認，無論與米薯搭檔有多麼荒謬，米薯純粹的心靈為他撥開人性虛偽的迷霧。米薯作為搞笑擔當，格格不入的社會地位承接眾人的嘲笑，看似搞不清楚狀況，實則療癒所有他接觸的人們。 Life slaps Victor in the face when he loses his wife and job on the same day. Devastated and desperate for comfort, he seeks out all his colleagues, friends, and family, but no one gives a damn; everyone has their own crisis to deal with. While drinking away his sorrows,  simple-minded bum Michou unexpectedly became Victor’s only listener. However, their relationship quickly escalates into absurdity when Michou latches onto Victor, following him wherever he goes.
source_language_note: 發音：法語 字幕： ▲ 影片拷貝非英語發音且無英文字幕 Non-English language film without English subtitles.
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
tmdb_overview: Victor is a legal advisor who finds himself abandoned by his wife and fired the same day. He tries to seek comfort from different friends and family members, but everyone he meets is concerned with their own problems. His morale begins to falter when he realizes that no one cares about him.
tmdb_overview_en: Victor is a legal advisor who finds himself abandoned by his wife and fired the same day. He tries to seek comfort from different friends and family members, but everyone he meets is concerned with their own problems. His morale begins to falter when he realizes that no one cares about him.

movie_title: 【聽．視界電影院】不能流淚的悲傷
synopsis: 從青梅竹馬到年少心動，趙心卉和林漢聰認定彼此是攜手一生的人，然而面對遠距離的隔閡、家庭的牽絆，以及學長陳孝名的驚喜告白，讓兩人一次次走散。堅持還是放手？在心卉猶豫之時，鄰居大叔對愛情的篤定，讓她深深動容，她能否找回遺失的愛人，收獲相伴一生的美滿愛情？
source_language_note: 語言 國語 字幕 中文
synopsis_en: From childhood sweethearts to the spark of young love, Zhao Xinhui (He Landou) and Lin Hancong (Cai Fanxi) were certain they were meant to spend the rest of their lives together. However, when faced with the strain of a long-distance relationship, family obligations, and a surprise confession from their senior, Chen Xiaoming (Greg Hsu), what choice will she ultimately make?
tmdb_overview: 從青梅竹馬到年少心動，趙心卉（何藍逗 飾）和林漢聰（蔡凡熙 飾）認定彼此是攜手一生的人，然而面對遠距離的隔閡、家庭的牽絆，以及學長陳孝名（許光漢 飾）的驚喜告白，究竟她會如何選擇呢？

movie_title: ㄟ！跟你說個祕密-大勇棒球隊
synopsis: 大勇棒球隊的孩子個個都有棒球夢，但一次次的投球失誤、揮棒落空、輸球，都會被教練罵得很慘。還好他們彼此陪伴，才能繼續快快樂樂、嬉皮笑臉的打棒球。 孩子的「祕密」或許是傷心的回憶、人際關係焦慮、與家人之間無法明說的複雜關係。當我們拿著攝影機靠近孩子，發現他們的眼睛比大人想像得更為澄澈，他們正用自己的方式摸索出一套生存法則，我們想透過這一系列的節目，陪他們走一段「通往祕密」的路。
source_language_note: 發音/字幕： 中文發音/中文字幕
synopsis_en: The children of the Dayong Baseball Team all share a dream of baseball, but every pitching error, missed swing, and lost game earns them a harsh scolding from their coach. Fortunately, they have each other’s company, allowing them to keep playing with a lighthearted and resilient spirit. A child’s "secret" might be a painful memory, social anxiety, or a complex, unspoken relationship with their family. When we approach these children with our cameras, we find that their eyes are clearer than adults could ever imagine. They are navigating their own survival strategies in their own way; through this series, we hope to accompany them on a journey "towards their secrets."

synopsis: 七噸重的大象，每一步都帶來沉重的轟鳴，每一聲都在抗拒地心的呼喚；而這一次，牠要對抗引力、挑戰跳跳床！結合導演對動物的狂熱，前身7 Tonnes 2早在 2003年推出時即掀起話題，這版不僅提高3D技術層次，加入更多動作，更異想天開要幫大象挑戰不可能的任務！
source_language_note: 發音/字幕： 無對白/無字幕
tmdb_overview: The elephant trains on a trampoline, defying the laws of weightlessness.  In 2004, the film was released under the title " 7 Tonnes 2", and later was finalized by the author and received the title "7 Tonnes 3".
tmdb_overview_en: The elephant trains on a trampoline, defying the laws of weightlessness.  In 2004, the film was released under the title " 7 Tonnes 2", and later was finalized by the author and received the title "7 Tonnes 3".

movie_title: 動物哇哈哈-魯蛇獅減重大作戰
synopsis: 好吃懶做的魯蛇獅胖到連獵物羚羊都追不到，幾次吃鱉後決心努力減重健身，終於可以追上身手矯健的羚羊，大快朵⋯⋯？一起大快朵頤運動飲料啦！
source_language_note: 發音/字幕： 無對白/無字幕
synopsis_en: A lazy, gluttonous "loser" lion has grown so fat that he can’t even catch an antelope. After failing miserably time and again, he resolves to lose weight and get fit. Finally, he manages to catch up with the agile antelope, ready to feast... on sports drinks together!

synopsis: 紅鶴與長頸鹿對抗的籃球比賽，長頸鹿是否有絕對的身高優勢來贏球呢？
source_language_note: 發音/字幕： 無對白/無字幕
tmdb_overview: Animalympics is all about the Animal Olympics Contest where all the animals around the world gather to take part in everything from skiing in North America to the very long marathon race in humid conditions.
tmdb_overview_en: Animalympics is all about the Animal Olympics Contest where all the animals around the world gather to take part in everything from skiing in North America to the very long marathon race in humid conditions.

movie_title: 小小上學趣_追趕跑跳碰
synopsis: 小小是一個天馬行空又想像力豐富的小學生，快來看看他跟他的朋友們的小腦袋，是怎麼看待每天上學放學發生的每一件大小事？當孩子們在外面賽跑時，小小的媽媽請他們照顧一下蒂娜，這群朋友決定教蒂娜如何跑步，儘管她連走路都還不會⋯⋯
source_language_note: 發音/字幕： 英文發音/中文字幕
tmdb_overview: Joan Ximénez el Petitet is a Catalan gypsy who pursues a dream. A former musician now —a percussionist, son of Ramón el Huesos who worked with the mythical singer Peret—, and affected by a rare chronic disease, he wants to accomplish the promise he made to his mother before she died: to celebrate a rumba concert on the stage of the Liceu, a great theater in Barcelona, along with a big symphony orchestra.
tmdb_overview_en: Joan Ximénez el Petitet is a Catalan gypsy who pursues a dream. A former musician now —a percussionist, son of Ramón el Huesos who worked with the mythical singer Peret—, and affected by a rare chronic disease, he wants to accomplish the promise he made to his mother before she died: to celebrate a rumba concert on the stage of the Liceu, a great theater in Barcelona, along with a big symphony orchestra.

synopsis: 人鵝間的大戰，一觸即發⋯⋯夢想成為足球員的男孩，某天在家裡院子練習時，突然發現一隻喜怒無常的鵝出現在面前，為他的生活帶來許多困擾。看來，在達成夢想之前，英雄得過「鵝」這關！幽默逗趣的劇情中意外包裹真摯親情，詼諧自在的3D偶動畫，出了戲院後絕對會掛上大大微笑細細回味！
source_language_note: 發音/字幕： 英文發音/中文字幕
synopsis_en:
The battle between boy and goose is about to begin! A young boy dreaming of becoming a soccer player is practicing in his backyard one day when a temperamental goose suddenly appears, turning his life upside down. It seems that before he can achieve his dreams, our hero must first get past the "goose"! 

Beneath its humorous and quirky plot lies a touching story of family bonds. This witty 3D puppet animation is sure to leave you with a wide smile and plenty to savor long after you leave the theater.

movie_title: 紅葉悍將_打擊區的勇氣
synopsis: 沈惟翔在一場比賽中不小心被球打到眼睛，因而陷入一段低潮期。 重新站上打擊區的他，該如何鼓起勇氣，面對心裡的害怕呢？
source_language_note: 發音/字幕： 中文發音/中文字幕
tmdb_overview: When a young Native American boy struggles with self-confidence and societal expectations, his uncle introduces him to the transformative art of Hoop Dance. Through this tradition, he discovers strength, resilience, and the courage to embrace his heritage. Inspired by true events, Courage is a heartfelt story about identity and empowerment.
tmdb_overview_en: When a young Native American boy struggles with self-confidence and societal expectations, his uncle introduces him to the transformative art of Hoop Dance. Through this tradition, he discovers strength, resilience, and the courage to embrace his heritage. Inspired by true events, Courage is a heartfelt story about identity and empowerment.

synopsis: 運動場上，有一個小小鳥走來，發現了一個長得很像，似乎又不太像的朋友，靜靜地躺在地板上。

synopsis: 在智利的阿塔卡馬沙漠中，因長年乾旱與政府的無所作為，讓小鎮生活日漸凋零。上街抗議無功而返的居民紛紛搬離，足球隊男孩安坦目睹隊友一個個離開，隨著足球上的紀念簽名越來越多，依依不捨的失落與孤獨，也成為童年記憶碎片的一部份。

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
movie_title_en: Barbie as The Princess and the Pauper
synopsis: 王國裡，有兩個長得一模一樣的女孩，責任重大的安娜莉絲公主，和債務累累的平民女孩艾麗卡，她們同時懷抱著有一天能解開束縛，飛向自由的夢想。兩人的命運 註 定相遇，當安娜莉絲公主被預謀篡位的 普敏格 大臣抓走，艾麗卡必須假 扮 成公主。在 普敏格 大臣的計畫得逞前，她必須騙過所有人，爭取時間把真公主救出來，否則一切將太遲！ 改編自馬克吐溫的故事，芭比在《真假公主芭比》中分飾兩角，挑戰首部動畫音樂劇，以七首原創歌曲，讓這部以現代手法重現的經典故事中充滿生氣，描述陰錯陽差的身分交換與友 誼 的力量。

synopsis: ★2022 美國國家評論協會年度十佳電影 ★2023 奧斯卡最佳男主角提名 ★2023 英國電影學院獎編劇、導演、製作人處女作獎；最佳影片、最佳男主角等3項大獎提名 充滿好奇心的11歲女孩蘇菲和她年輕的單身父親卡倫，一起前往碧海藍天的土耳其渡假。即將成為青少女的她，珍惜與父親難得的共處時光，那裡發生的每一件小事，更不知不覺刻劃出他們互為磐石的情感。20年後，蘇菲已是當年父親出遊的年紀，她回想起那年夏天的記憶碎片，那位熟悉又陌生的父親，逐漸顯露出她不曾察覺的憂傷...... https://reurl.cc/Wb0kMy

tmdb_overview_en: Sophie reflects on the shared joy and private melancholy of a holiday she took with her father twenty years earlier. Memories fill the gaps between camcorder footages as she tries to reconcile the father she knew with the troubled man she didn't.

synopsis: 清朝道光至咸豐年間，廣州名狀師宋世傑為求生計，專替有罪富人打官司脫罪，巧言善辯、顛倒是非，因而遭天譴，與心地善良卻潑辣正義的妻子屢次喪子，封筆從善後，宋在妻子感召下重出江湖，仗義為含冤寡婦楊秀珍伸冤，力抗貪官與官官相護，夫妻聯手機智辯案，揭穿黑幕，終令惡人伏法，善有善報，兒孫滿堂。
source_language_note: 語言 粵語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: 在清朝道光至咸豐年間，宋世傑（周星馳 飾）是廣州有名的狀師。他因為了家中生計，專替有罪的富人打官司脫罪獲取不義之財而遭天譴，使得十幾個兒子相繼早夭。他與心地善良有正義感但潑辣的妻子（梅豔芳 飾）十分恩愛。為了不絕後，宋世傑經妻子勸告後决定不再造惡業，於是封筆停止辦案，並開了家小客棧謀生。 一日，宋世傑夫人巧遇從山西落難到廣州的孕婦楊秀珍（吳家麗 飾），得知她的丈夫被姚大（戚其義 飾）夫婦害死的冤情，但由於姚大老婆姚田氏（苑瓊丹 飾）乃山西布政司（梁家仁 飾）的妹妹，囙此得到山西官員的庇護。宋夫人請丈夫為楊氏伸冤，被宋拒絕。於是宋夫人自寫狀紙，不料上堂卻被廣州新任知縣何汝大（吳孟達 飾）打傷，宋世傑囙此怒火中燒，决定重出江湖，為楊氏討個公道。 因何汝大收受山西布政司的密信和五千兩白銀的賄賂，所以何將宋世傑打入監牢，後宋靠裝瘋得以逃脫。在楊青（高雄 飾）的幫助下，宋請來八府巡按大人（秦沛 飾）來此審案。在宋與老婆的精彩配合與聰明智辯下，揭出廣州知縣與山西布政司之間的內幕交易。 最終不僅姚大夫婦二人被繩之以法，官官相護的醜惡嘴臉也得到了淋漓盡致的諷刺與鞭笞。而宋世傑夫婦經過此事，也脫離生子早夭的宿命，最後兒孫滿堂。
tmdb_overview_en: An unscrupulous lawyer with an equally eccentric kung-fu sidekick wife tries to bring justice to the court.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 小鎮上突然出現一隻獨角獸，麵包店的女兒奧潔塔好奇地跟在後面，意外踏進魔幻森林，卻受到巫師羅伯特的詛咒，變成一隻天鵝。在仙后的幫助下，奧潔塔能在夜晚恢復成人型，但只要太陽升起便會失效。仙后告訴奧潔塔，她是被魔法水晶選中的人，能夠對抗羅伯特強大的法力，然而奧潔塔天生害羞又缺乏自信，她開始懷疑自己真的能拯救魔法森林，解開詛咒嗎？ 改編自彼得柴可夫斯基的著名芭蕾舞劇《天鵝湖》，芭比飾演天鵝湖公主奧潔塔。在月光下隨著音樂翩翩起舞，奧潔塔為拯救魔幻森林的夥伴，相信自己一定可以，即便面對強大的巫師，也不退縮。
